text.title: GitOps — Secrets and Security Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on secret presence + compliance + key custody options.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: pick-strategy
step.action: Choose SOPS / Sealed Secrets / ESO / CSI per workload class.

step.name: configure-key-custody
step.action: Bind to KMS or audited age keyring; document key_ref.

step.name: define-rotation-and-rbac
step.action: Set rotation cadence per class; scope ServiceAccounts.

step.name: encode-agent-policy-validate
step.action: Author agent secret policy + guardrails; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
